name: Jungle Jeep Simulator
description: Get ready for an exciting off-road adventure in Jungle Jeep Simulator! Drive powerful jeeps through a wild jungle environment filled with rough paths, sharp turns, and challenging obstacles. Test your driving skills across 60 thrilling levels, including 30 easy levels to get started and 30 hard levels for extreme challenges. Explore dense forests, muddy tracks, and dangerous routes as you complete missions and unlock new challenges. Each level brings a unique experience that keeps you engaged and entertained.
instructions: Keyboard and mobile control both supported
